figures.caption: Table 1: Quantitative comparison of generation quality across intra-modal (WiFi to WiFi) and cross-modal (WiFi to mmWave and RFID) scenarios.

Figure 2: RF-CMG overview. A frozen WiFi-pretrained backbone is guided by MGE to learn target-modality highfrequency patterns, while LFMC imposes low-frequency structural constraints during the generation process.
Figure 10: Visualization of cross-modal generation results across baseline methods and RF-CMG.
